author: SW4GN3R [STAR]
metadata: _Reply context:_ @everyone Joni Award Winners , Congratulations to today’s Joni Award winners! The community and our team are grateful for everything you do and the sacrifices you make to help our ecosystem thrive and push Star Atlas forward. COMMUNITY MEMBER OF THE YEAR: @[Λ] Neo_AArmstrong [EC] , Content Creator of the Year: @beyondthehorizon2620 , Most Popular Guild of the Year: Aephia , Best Community Tool of the Year: Eveeye ( @Ryden ) , Star Atlas IP Project / Business of the Year: Star Atlas TV ( @odvb ) , Community Helper of the Year: @Jindo | Star Atlas Mod , Best Gunplay Player of the Year @[COEX] Hakmer , Most Knowledgeable Member of the Year: @[AEP] Lerinor , Most Entertaining Video of the Year: The Star Atlas Summit Experience ( @Atlas Theory @Shaddix1 | Star Atlas Mod ) , They're all going home with the extremely rare golden Joni Trophy!
content:
@everyone  Joni Award Winners,Congratulations to today’s Joni Award winners! The community and our team are grateful for everything you do and the sacrifices you make to help our ecosystem thrive and push Star Atlas forward.  COMMUNITY MEMBER OF THE YEAR: @[Λ] Neo_AArmstrong [EC],Content Creator of the Year: @beyondthehorizon2620,Most Popular Guild of the Year: Aephia,Best Community Tool of the Year: Eveeye ( @Ryden ),Star Atlas IP Project / Business of the Year: Star Atlas TV ( @odvb ),Community Helper of the Year: @Jindo | Star Atlas Mod,Best Gunplay Player of the Year @[COEX] Hakmer,Most Knowledgeable Member of the Year: @[AEP] Lerinor,Most Entertaining Video of the Year: The Star Atlas Summit Experience ( @Atlas Theory @Shaddix1 | Star Atlas Mod ), They're all going home with the extremely rare golden Joni Trophy!

Mentions: @[Λ] Neo_AArmstrong [EC], @beyondthehorizon2620, @Ryden, @odvb, @Jindo | Star Atlas Mod, @[COEX] Hakmer, @[AEP] Lerinor, @Atlas Theory, @Shaddix1 | Star Atlas Mod
